## Main Site Pages (for internal linking from blog)

| Path | Title | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `/` | Entourage Gummies homepage | Primary CTA destination |
| `/shop` | Shop | Tier A CTA destination |
| `/shop/relaxed` | Relaxed blend product page | Cluster A, E, F linking (when live) |
| `/shop/balanced` | Balanced blend product page | Cluster A, E, F linking (when live) |
| `/shop/uplifted` | Uplifted blend product page | Cluster A, E, F linking (when live) |
| `/explore-technology` | Our Science / TiME INFUSION deep dive | Cluster B linking |
| `/effects` | The Entourage Effect page | Cluster A linking |
| `/contact` | Contact | Wholesale inquiry, support |
| `/terms` | Terms & Conditions | Footer legal |
| `/privacy` | Privacy Policy | Footer legal |
| `/refund-policy` | Refund Policy | Footer legal |
| `/shipping-policy` | Shipping Policy | Footer legal |

**Dependency:** per-blend product pages (`/shop/relaxed`, `/shop/balanced`, `/shop/uplifted`) are required by the 2026-04-10 feedback PDF and are a prerequisite for internal linking in most Phase 1 blog posts. If the main site ships without them, every spoke post's link architecture has to be rewritten to point to `/shop` with URL fragments.

---

## Planned Service Area Pages

Entourage Gummies is a direct-to-consumer nationwide brand. Service area pages are **not** a Phase 1 priority (Pattern P-006: target national keywords, localize through content, not URL slugs). The one exception is a Charlotte, North Carolina page for local authority signals:

| Path | Target keyword | Priority | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `/about/charlotte-north-carolina` | hemp gummies charlotte nc | Low | Phase 3 at earliest |

---

## Blog Infrastructure Pages

| URL | Auto-generated by | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `/blog/` | `build.js` -> `templates/index.html` | Blog index / listing page |
| `/blog/sitemap.xml` | `build.js` -> `buildSitemap()` | XML sitemap for GSC |
| `/blog/rss.xml` | `build.js` -> `buildRss()` | RSS feed (latest 20 posts) |
| `/blog/robots.txt` | `build.js` -> `buildRobotsTxt()` | Crawler directives |
